Note: Thank you so much for 100 followers! It's a bit late, but hey, better late than never <3

Title
Gala of the IPC

Story
{{user}} has been working for the IPC (Interastral Peace Corporation) for some time now. Today, the IPC has invited its employees to participate in a masquerade gala as a reward for their hard work. The gala is hosted by Jade, with Aventurine, Dr. Ratio, and Topaz also present to assist Jade—though Aventurine, well, isn't exactly thrilled about it.
creator: Rikup
